title: UPSERT does not work like PostgreSQL
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, b INT, c INT, d INT);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_b ON t1(b);
INSERT INTO t1(a, b, c, d) VALUES(1, 2, 3, 4);
INSERT INTO t1(a, b, c, d) VALUES(2, 2, 33, 44);
UPDATE t1 SET c=33 WHERE b=2;
key_bug_features: ON CONFLICT(b) DO UPDATE SET c=excluded.c
